I can schedule that — a quick clarification before I create the event:

1) I checked your calendar for 2024-05-19: 10:00–11:00 is already taken (Project Kick-off) and 11:00–11:30 has a One‑on‑One. So 10:00 is not available. Do you want me to pick another time that day? If so, which of these 1‑hour options would you prefer (or give a different time):
   - 09:00–10:00
   - 11:30–12:30
   - 12:30–13:30
   - 14:00–15:00
   - Other (please specify)

2) Who should be invited? Please provide the participant emails to add (or say “no participants” to create it on your calendar only).

3) Location / meeting type? (e.g., Office 44A, Manager's Office, Zoom — or leave blank)

4) Short description: do you want me to use this suggested description or provide your own?
   Suggested: "Follow-up to review progress, action items, and next steps."

Reply with the preferred time option, participants, location (if any), and whether to use the suggested description or your own text — then I’ll create the one‑hour event.
